ValidationRule.description: 属性・輸管・法務・財務・技術力で各１つ以上〇が無いとエラーにする
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( OR( TEXT(JVMemberAttributeSurveyResult__c) != "〇", TEXT(JVMemberCustomerSurveyResult__c ) != "〇", TEXT(JVMemberContractConfirmationResult__c ) != "〇", AND( TEXT(JVMemberFinancialEvaluationCompanyTSR__c ) != "〇", TEXT(JVMemberFinancialEvaluationTradingAchiev__c ) != "〇", TEXT(JVMemberFinancialEvaluationRelatedCompan__c ) != "〇" ), AND( TEXT(JVMemberTechnologyEvaluationOurCompany__c ) != "〇", TEXT(JVMemberTechnologyEvaluationOtherCompany__c ) != "〇", TEXT(JVMemberTechnologyEvaluationSame__c ) != "〇" ) ), TEXT(JVMemberEvaluationResult__c ) == "諾" )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: 属性・輸管・法務・財務・技術力で各1以上〇、合計5以上の〇で「諾」判定には出来ません。
